commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content: 1 Esdras Wisdom of Solomon Wisdom of Sirach Epistle of Jeremiah Prayer of Manasseh But you, O son of man, behold, they shall put cords upon you, and shall bind you with them, and you shall not go out among them: Bands. It is uncertain whether by his order, or they supposed he was deranged, as our Saviour's brethren meant to treat him, Mark iii. The Chaldean explains it figuratively of God's order, attaching the prophet to his service. (Calmet) But real chains would more forcibly show the future captivity of Juda (Haydock) which the prophet declared both by words and actions.

methodology.step_1: Parse main page with BeautifulSoup for structure
methodology.step_3: Use Firecrawl to get full content from 'Go to Commentary' links
methodology.step_4: Fallback to BeautifulSoup for accordion content if needed
advantages: Records verses even without commentaries for complete tracking
